/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -g CMakeFiles/ffbblog.dir/bblog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffbblog.dir/__/bblogfile.cpp.o -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/bin/ffbblog  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib:/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces -lstdc++ /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libSwitchInterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -L/usr/lib64 -lmagic -ldaemon /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
